items.headline: Do Rising Earnings Estimates Reframe Albemarle's (ALB) Lithium Strategy as Discipline or Cyclicality?
items.snippet: Analysts lifted earnings estimates for the current quarter and fiscal years ahead of its August 5, 2026 earnings release, reflected in a strong Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

items.headline: Will ALB's Expansion Actions Power Stronger Sales Volumes?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation ALB is strategically executing its projects aimed at boosting its global lithium conversion capacity. ALB saw higher sales volumes (up 14% year over year) in its Energy Storage unit in the first quarter.

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming the Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and the S&P 500's declines of 6.7% and 0.1%, respectively. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately.

items.headline: The U.S. Is Increasing Efforts to Rebuild Its Rare Earth Supply Chain
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation posted a sharp turnaround: Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA jumped 148% year over year to $664 million as lithium prices rebounded from 2025 lows, and used the recovery to retire $1.3 billion of debt.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: After lithium prices collapsed from their 2022 peaks, the market finally found its floor in late 2024 and has staged a resilient year-to-date rebound. Chinese spot prices have climbed back into the $23 per kilogram range, up from their $10 kg low in the fall of 2024, thanks to a

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion 'Buy' - Citi
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB) from 'High Risk' to 'Buy'. The target price remains at $225, citing underestimated growth potential despite recent weakness in spot lithium prices.
